description: Displays a probability mass function from a sample space, binomial distribution, or manual data. Standalone chart with at() positioning.

arguments.name: source
arguments.description: Source sample space or binomial distribution

arguments.name: randomVariable
arguments.description: Random variable to plot (sum, max, min, product, heads)

examples.expression:
S = sspace(at(4,4), view(14,20), dice(2))
P = pmf(at(18,4), view(10,16), S, "sum")
